# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: ssh-rule
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1/firewalls
  properties:
    network: projects/{{project}}/global/networks/default
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
    allowed:
    - protocol: tcp
      ports: ['22']

- name: rdp-rule
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1/firewalls
  properties:
    network: projects/{{project}}/global/networks/default
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
    allowed:
    - protocol: tcp
      ports: ['3389']

- name: http-rule
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1/firewalls
  properties:
    network: projects/{{project}}/global/networks/default
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
    allowed:
    - protocol: tcp
      ports: ['80']

- name: https-rule
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1/firewalls
  properties:
    network: projects/{{project}}/global/networks/default
    sourceRanges: ['0.0.0.0/0']
    allowed:
    - protocol: tcp
      ports: ['443']
